difficultyYoungsterDesc: Vanilla encounters and trainers. Innates unlock FREE by level (run only). DOUBLE candy. Vanilla egg vouchers.
difficultyAceDesc: Classic PokeRogue. Vanilla encounters and trainers. Innates unlock with candies. 1.5x candy gain. 1 egg voucher per trainer win.
difficultyEliteDesc: ER trainer teams, ghost battles vs real players, more trainers and rivals. Wild shinies 1.5x. 2 egg vouchers per win.
difficultyHellDesc: The hardest ER rosters, early megas, near-constant trainers and ghosts. Wild shinies 2x. 3 egg vouchers per win.
invalidParty: This is not a valid starting party!
blackShinyLimit: Only one Black Shiny can be selected per team.
selectMoveSwapOut: Select a move to swap out.
selectMoveSwapWith: Select a move to swap with
difficultyMysteryDesc: Testing gauntlet: every wave is a mystery event, ghost battle, boss, or Giratina bargain. Staging only.
